history.content:
<thought>
I am facing upward in the local view. The cell directly ahead is row 06 column D, which is lava, so moving forward would be deadly. The safe open cell to my right is row 07 column E, so I should turn right to face that direction before moving.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing upward. The cell directly ahead is a safe floor cell, while the cells to my right are blocked by a wall column and the left side contains lava nearby. Moving forward keeps me on a safe path toward the open area above.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I’m facing upward, and the cell directly ahead is row 06 column D, which is safe floor. Turning would not help immediately. Moving forward advances me into the open corridor toward the unexplored area, while avoiding lava at C in this column pattern and the wall at E.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 07 column D, facing up. The cell directly ahead is row 06 column D, which is safe `.`. Moving forward keeps me in the open corridor and is the best immediate progress.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I’m facing upward, and the cell directly ahead is an open floor cell, while the cells to my left are lava and the cell to my right is a wall. Moving forward is the only safe progress option.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing upward, and the cell directly ahead is a wall, so moving forward is blocked. The open path is to my left, where there is safe floor. I will turn left to face that direction and continue navigating around the obstacle and lava.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
The goal is visible at the top row, column F. I am facing upward, and the cell directly in front of me is a safe floor cell, so moving forward is the best step toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing upward. The cell directly in front of me is lava, so moving forward is unsafe. To reach the goal at row 02, column F, I need to avoid the lava cluster and first turn toward a safe open cell. The cell to my right is also lava, so the safest immediate move is to turn left.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I’m at row 07 column C, facing upward. The cell directly ahead (row 06 column C) is safe floor, while the goal is not visible yet. Moving forward is the safest way to continue exploring upward through the corridor and avoid the lava column to my right.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
